hindi: जय जय पशुपति देव हर कर्मनुग्रहं,
english: Victory, victory to Pashupati — remove the burden of karma with your grace
roman: Jaya jaya Pashupati deva hara karma nugrahm

english: Victory, victory to the supreme Lord — grant the gift of liberation
roman: Jaya jaya Parameshana dehi moksha dayakam

english: May all souls bound like animals be freed from their bonds
O Pashupati, with compassion protect me everywhere
Salutations to the lord of all gods, salutations to the lord of all beings
roman: Namaste sarva devaya namaste sarva bhutaye

english: Salutations to the Rudra form, salutations to the shepherd of souls
roman: Namaste Rudra murtaye Pashupaalaya te namah

english: Salutations to the boon-giver, salutations to the creator of all
roman: Varadaya namastubhyam namah sarva krite namah

hindi: पशुपतय नमस्तुभ्यं नमः शिवाय ते नमः॥
english: Salutations to Pashupati, salutations to Shiva — salutations to you
roman: Pashupataya namastubhyam namah Shivaya te namah

english: This Pashupati Ashtakam — whoever reads it daily in the presence of Shiva
roman: Pashupata ashtakam idam yah pathet nityam Shivantike

english: Is freed from all bonds and attains union with Shiva
roman: Muchyate sarva pashe bhyah Shiva sayujyam apnuyat
